description_long: This is a medium-sized, vintage-style steam-powered boat with a dark, weathered hull and a wooden deck. The boat features a raised cabin with windows and a slanted roof, a prominent smokestack, and a lifebuoy attached to the side. Two tall masts with rigging lines are positioned toward the bow, suggesting it may have auxiliary sails or be used for fishing or cargo handling. The stern has a small open area with a ladder leading down, and the overall structure is robust, with visible metal and wood construction. The deck is mostly open, providing space for movement or storage, and the boat's design is reminiscent of early 20th-century workboats or tugboats.
description: A vintage steam-powered boat with a dark hull, wooden deck, raised cabin, smokestack, and rigging masts, featuring a lifebuoy and open stern area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the boat, the raised cabin, smokestack, lifebuoy, and both masts with rigging.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the stern, open area with a ladder, and the back of the cabin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cabin, smokestack, and masts, with the lifebuoy visible on this side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the open deck layout, placement of the cabin, smokestack, and masts.
